textPlain: There's another bug, where you don't update psrc in those error return cases.  The parser will be stuck at the malformed % forever.  Or maybe that is desired; it's hard to tell.The precedence stuff here is pretty basic.  When in doubt, using parentheses to make order explicit is never wrong.  Or consult https://en.cppreference.com/w/c/language/operator_precedence... .
